customer_support_sops.overview: Standard Operating Procedures for ShopEase Customer Support Team to ensure consistent, high-quality service delivery.

communication_standards.personalization: Use customer's name, reference order details
communication_standards.closing: Always ask if there's anything else you can help with

escalation_triggers: Customer requests to speak with supervisor

step_1.details: Request order number and email address. If customer doesn't have order number, search by email and confirm shipping address.

step_2.details: Pull up order details, verify status, review order history and any previous support interactions.

step_3.details: Share current status, tracking number if shipped, estimated delivery date. If delayed, proactively explain reason and provide revised timeline.

step_4.details: If customer reports problem, follow appropriate SOP (lost package, damaged item, etc.). Document all communications in order notes.

step_5.details: If issue unresolved, schedule follow-up. Set reminder to check status and contact customer proactively.

step_1.details: Check last scan location and date. If no scans for 5+ days after ship date, proceed to Step 2.

step_2.details: File trace request with shipping carrier. Document case number and expected resolution time (typically 5-7 business days).

step_3.details: Inform customer of trace request, provide case number, and set expectation for resolution timeline.

step_4.details: If package not located within 7 days: Offer immediate refund OR rush replacement shipment (customer choice). Process request same day.

step_5.details: Flag delivery address for signature requirement on future orders if in high-theft area.

step_1.details: Ask customer to email photos showing: damaged item, packaging, shipping label. Photos must clearly show extent of damage.

step_2.details: Review photos. If minor cosmetic damage, offer 15% discount to keep. If significant damage, proceed to Step 3.

step_3.details: Provide three options: (1) Full refund with return label, (2) Replacement shipment (keep damaged item), (3) Store credit for 110% of purchase price.

step_4.details: Execute chosen resolution immediately. If replacement, ship within 24 hours using expedited shipping at no charge.

step_5.details: File incident report with warehouse team for packaging improvement. Include photos and carrier information.

eligibility_check.details: Check days since delivery: Standard items (30 days), Electronics (14 days), Jewelry (60 days). If outside window, escalate for exception consideration.

initiate_return.details: Create RMA number in system, email return label to customer, provide instructions for packaging and drop-off locations.

track_return.details: Track return package. Upon arrival at warehouse, verify condition within 24 hours. Flag any discrepancies (used item, wrong item returned).

process_refund.details: If item passes inspection, process refund within 24 hours. Email confirmation with expected credit date (3-5 business days). If failed inspection, contact customer with evidence and options.

quality_assurance.details: Inspect returned items for resale eligibility. Items showing wear go to clearance. Defective items sent to vendor for credit.

code_not_working.step_2: Check code expiration date and usage limits
code_not_working.step_3: Confirm cart meets minimum purchase requirements
code_not_working.step_4: Ensure items aren't excluded (sale items, specific brands)
code_not_working.step_5: If all conditions met but still failing, manually apply discount and report bug to tech team

code_requests.policy: Do not provide discount codes unless customer received one via email/promotional materials. Direct them to sign up for email list for future promotions.
code_requests.exceptions: May provide one-time 10% courtesy code for: service recovery after poor experience, technical issues causing checkout problems, delayed shipments

refund_processing.standard_timeline: 5-7 business days after return received or cancellation

delayed_refunds.large_purchases_over_$500: May require manager approval, up to 10 business days

partial_refunds.process: Email customer with photos/explanation, offer partial refund amount (typically 50-70%), await confirmation before processing

checkout_problems: Check if billing address matches card

escalation_to_tech_team.response_time: Tech team will respond within 4 hours during business hours

red_flags: Multiple orders to different addresses with same payment
Rush shipping requests on high-value electronics
Orders from high-risk countries to domestic address

verification_steps.action: Contact customer via phone to verify order
verification_steps.required_info: Confirm billing address, last 4 of card, purpose of purchase
verification_steps.documentation: Note conversation details in order comments

cancellation_protocol.when: Customer cannot be reached or fails verification
cancellation_protocol.action: Cancel order, refund payment, flag account for review
cancellation_protocol.notification: Email customer explaining security measure and steps to reorder

customer_satisfaction.follow_up: Negative ratings (<3) trigger supervisor review and customer callback

order_processing.picking: Orders picked in batch by zone. High-priority (express) orders picked first. Scan each item barcode to verify accuracy.
order_processing.packing: Use appropriate box size. Electronics require bubble wrap. Fragile items marked with stickers. Include packing slip and promotional materials.
order_processing.shipping: Print labels via integrated system. Attach to package securely. Scan outbound to update tracking. Load onto carrier trucks by 6 PM daily for same-day processing.

inventory_management.receiving: Inspect incoming shipments for damage. Verify quantities against PO. Update inventory system immediately. Report discrepancies to purchasing.
inventory_management.cycle_counts: Conduct daily cycle counts on high-turnover items. Full inventory quarterly. Investigate and correct variances >2%.
inventory_management.stockouts: Alert purchasing when inventory drops below reorder point. Update product pages to 'Out of Stock'. Offer email notifications when restocked.
